title: Moonstone :Virus
description: An independent branch of Moonstone Mod that adds biological genes to the game
body:
## be careful:
This mod is an **independent branch** of Moonstone and can be used without using the original mod.

But it is **not** recommended to use Moonstone Mod again!

## Main text description:

This mod incorporates several famous viruses from a certain game, among which Necora virus and Vampire virus are the most unique.

The former allows players to transform other creatures into their own zombie army, while the latter allows players to summon bats during attacks. You can even make your virus more aggressive by changing your genetic sequence.

To obtain these virus accessories, you need to complete a series of challenges set by the author in the mod

For example, that can summon its own zombies to assist in combat:
![necora](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/166800fd1d5f680c651313b62f6c3d1c1147ade9.png)

And also the items obtained by the opening player

![gene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e25f4d718bb38b5d44146f75ca195e410d9f8e.png)

## other

If you don't know how to play, please install the JEI mod or visit: [Virus](https://moonstonemod.fandom.com/zh/wiki/%E5%83%B5%E5%B0%B8%E7%97%85%E6%AF%92)
